Welcome to bard’s documentation!¶

bard is an efficient, PyTorch-native library for rigid-body dynamics, designed for batch processing and differentiability. It’s an ideal tool for robotics research, especially in areas like reinforcement learning, trajectory optimization, and model-based control.

    • User Installation
    • Developer Installation
    • Building the Documentation
  • Quick Start
  • API Reference

    • Kinematics
    • Dynamics
    • Robot Chain
    • Data Structures
